name: HackQuest
fullText:
0G APAC Hackathon AMA #3: Where Ideas Turn Real 🎙️

We’ve covered the basics — now let’s get into what to actually build:
🔎 Find killer app ideas across all 5 tracks
🦾 Break down common dev issues from Week 1
💡 Go from no ideas to a full pipeline

Submit your questions ahead https://t.co/OKLgVSHwkq

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu clarifies that the ceasefire with Iran does not include Lebanon.

name: Monad 华语社群
fullText:
【香港 Web3 Festival｜与Monad一起拆解RWA落地与合规金融路径】

Monad Foundation将举办私密邀请制圆桌活动《Building the Rails》聚焦一个核心问题：

➥亚洲要如何扩大合规、RWA金融赛道？下一步又该建设什么？

📅活动时间：4月21日  上午10:30 - 下午1:30 https://t.co/ybkx1qFiWg

name: Solar (Solana中文社群)
fullText:
由 @OnePieceLabs 和 @solana 联合举办的 Solana APAC Bootcamp 正式落下帷幕——三周高强度培训、生态导师指导与亚太加速构建。

- 参与者来自香港、印尼、新加坡、印度等多个地区；
- 3,647 名申请者；
- 713 名成员完成课程

- 12 场直播课程，邀请顶级投资人与生态负责人；
- https://t.co/m0w6mYtNF4

name: Polymarket
fullText: JUST IN: Senator Lindsey Graham says he's "extremely cautious" about the ceasefire agreement.
